title: Pan Seared Argentinian Portobello Mushrooms Skewers
description: Earthy and shattering Argentinian dish featuring pandan leaf and robata grill, this lacto vegetarian friendly recipe is perfect for adventurous eaters, served in a bamboo steamer.

ingredients.name: portobello mushrooms
ingredients.notes: stems removed and caps sliced 1/2 inch thick

instructions: Preheat the robata grill to medium high heat.
Thread a portobello mushroom slice, a pandan leaf, and a lemongrass stalk onto each skewer.
Brush the skewers with olive oil and season with salt and black pepper.
Grill the skewers for 3-4 minutes per side, or until the mushrooms are tender and slightly charred.
Meanwhile, mix the chimichurri sauce with minced garlic.
Brush the grilled skewers with the chimichurri garlic sauce.
Place the skewers in a bamboo steamer lined with parchment paper.
Top each skewer with shredded mozzarella cheese and steam for 1-2 minutes, or until the cheese is melted.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with additional pandan leaves and lemongrass stalks if desired.
